title: Insects: Recrafted
description: Adds several different insects into the game
body:
Have any suggestion? Want to report a bug? We have a Discord server! You can join and ask anything you want!


Introduction

This mod aims to add several different insects into Minecraft! This is the official remake of an older mod simply called ''Insects'', but that mod was so bad and needed so much to get done, that we decided to do a full on remake and start the mod from the ground up again!

The insects this mod adds are generally just for ambience, but some of them have special features, just to make things a bit more interesting.

 

This mod is for Forge and there will never be a Fabric port.

 

List of insects in the mod & information about them

Ant

(Designed by wowthie)

Aggression: Passive
HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Insect leg
Special features: No
Spawning: Any biome that has grass

 

Fire Ant

(Designed by wowthie)

Aggression: Neutral

HP: 3

ATK: 1

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: When you hurt them, they'll attack you. When they hit you, you get set on fire for 2 seconds. They're immune to fire damage

Spawning: Badlands, Meadow and Stony Peaks

 

Honey Ant

(Designed by wowthie)

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Honey drop

Special features: No

Spawning: Birch forests

 

Cockroach

Aggression: Passive

HP: 15

ATK: 0

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: They're shy. When a player gets near them, they'll try to run away

Spawning: Plains, Flower forest, Sunflower plains, Windswept biomes, Meadow and Stony Peaks

 

Dragonfly

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: They fly around aimlessly, just like bats do

Spawning: Swamps, Rivers and Beaches

 

Firefly

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Glowstone dust

Special features: They fly around aimlessly, just like bats do. They also glow in the dark

Spawning: Anywhere that is dark

 

Fly

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: They fly around aimlessly, just like bats do

Spawning: Any biome that has grass. Maggots can become flies when they get fed rotten flesh.

 

Green Fly

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: They fly around aimlessly, just like bats do

Spawning: Savannas

 

Ladybug

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: No

Spawning: Taigas

 

Maggot

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Slime ball

Special features: When you feed them rotten flesh, they have a chance of becoming a fly

Spawning: Whenever a zombie dies, from 0 to 3 can spawn.

 

Moth

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: They fly around aimlessly, just like bats do. When feeding a Silk Worm rotten flesh, they can become a moth.

Spawning: Anywhere that is dark.

 

Snail

Aggression: Passive

HP: 6

ATK: 0

Drops: Slime ball (when not hidden) / Snail shell (when hidden)

Special features: If you attack it in such a way that you don't kill it in one hit, it'll hide in its shell. When it dies while hidden, it'll drop a snail shell, which can be used for brewing resistance potions. When you kill it while it's not hidden, it'll drop a slime ball.

Spawning: Anywhere that has grass

 

Worm

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Dead worm (It's food. You can eat it)

Special features: It drops itself when killed. You can eat its dead body, but you can also use it for taming beetles.

Spawning: Anywhere as long as the light level is from 0 to 6 and the set location blocks the view of the sky.

 

Centipede

Aggression: Hostile

HP: 6

ATK: 2

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: They give you Poison II for 3 seconds when they hurt you

Spawning: Any biome that has grass, during night or in dark places

 

Praying Mantis

(Modelled by Mr_Mantis_YT)

Aggression: Neutral

HP: 5

ATK: 2

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: When you hurt them, they'll start attacking you. They also actively try to hunt down smaller insects. When you name one ''Mr_Mantis_YT'' with a name tag, it'll get a special texture.

Spawning: Plains, Dark forests and Jungles 

 

Orchid Mantis

(Modelled by Mr_Mantis_YT)

Aggression: Neutral

HP: 5

ATK: 2

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: When you hurt them, they'll start attacking you. They also actively try to hunt down smaller insects

Spawning: Meadow, Flower forest, Cherry Grove and Sunflower plains

 

Rain Bug

Aggression: Hostile

HP: 5

ATK: 1

Drops: Rain Bug Plate

Special features: When killed, it drops its own plate, which can be either eaten or used in a brewing stand for making potions of Poison Immunity, which make you unable to get poisoned

Spawning: Deserts during night & Badlands during night

 

Butterfly

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Nothing

Special features: They fly around aimlessly, just like bats do. They can be caught with a Butterfly Catcher. They also come in different colors.

Spawning:

* Blue: Plains, Meadow, Forests & Dark forests

* Pink: Flower forest, Cherry Grove & Meadow

* Yellow: Sunflower plains & Birch forests

* Green: Jungles & Dark forests

 

Earwig

Aggression: Passive

HP: 4

ATK: 0

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: No

Spawning: Windswept biomes

 

Turtle Ant

(Designed by wowthie)

Aggression: Passive

HP: 5

ATK: 0

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: No

Spawning: 10% chance when breaking ant nests

 

Beetle

Aggression: Neutral

HP: 12

ATK: 2

Drops: Insect leg

Special features: When attacked, it'll attack you back. It can be tamed with dead worms. When tamed, they'll defend you from enemies.

Spawning: Savannas

 

Stick Bug

Aggression: Passive

HP: 4

ATK: 0

Drops: Stick & Insect Leg

Special features: When you right-click it with a music disc, a noteblock or a jukebox, it'll drop a new music disc called ''Get Stickbugged''. They only drop it once per stick bug.

Spawning: Forests, Birches, Dark forests & Taigas

 

Scorpion

Aggression: Hostile

HP: 15

ATK: 3

Drops: Scorpion sting

Special features: It gives you Poison II for 3 seconds when it attacks you. It drops a scorpion sting, which poisons enemies when you hit them with it. The scorpion sting can also be used for crafting a poisonous sword.

Spawning: Deserts during night & Badlands during night

 

Mosquito

Aggression: Hostile

HP: 3

ATK: 1

Drops: Mosquito Gland & Insect Leg

Special features: Attacks players while flying. Gives Poison I for 3 seconds to its victims.

Spawning: Any biome that has grass, during night or in dark places

 

Pill Bug

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: Wheat Seeds & Insect Leg

Special features: When attacked, it rolls on itself. When 9 seconds pass, it goes back to its regular state.

Spawning: Plains, Birch Forests, Taigas and Forests

 

Bed Bug

Aggression: Hostile

HP: 5

ATK: 2

Drops: Insect Leg

Special features: No

Spawning: Whenever you break a bed, there's a 7% chance for a bed bug to spawn from it.

 

Silk Worm

Aggression: Passive

HP: 3

ATK: 0

Drops: String

Special features: They can't move around. Silk worms can become moths when they get fed rotten flesh.

Spawning: Birches, dark forests & jungles

 

Water Strider

Aggression: Passive

HP: 4

ATK: 0

Drops: Insect Leg

Special features: They can be found floating on water. They can't move by themselves.

Spawning: Rivers

 

Whip Spider

Aggression: Hostile

HP: 15

ATK: 3

Drops: Spider Eye

Special features: They have slight knockback attack.

Spawning: Jungles & Dark forests

 

Slug

Aggression: Passive

HP: 4

ATK: 0

Drops: Slime ball

Special features: If you right click it with a Snail Shell, it will turn into a Snail.

Spawning: Anywhere that has grass

 

Antarctic Midge

Aggression: Passive

HP: 4

ATK: 0

Drops: Insect Leg

Special features: No

Spawning: Freezing biomes
